message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'skb_gso_reset' sets signal field 'skb_shared_info.gso_type', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=skb_shared_info;field=gso_type;offset=24] [oracle:assert=skb_shared_info.gso_type stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets gso_type without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
